parsed_review.summary:
CP00-577 (risk A, 10 units, RP18.P07.M05.S11-S20, "Permission And Audit Binding" audit-binding slice) passes read-only review with no findings. The pack is descriptor-only and internally consistent across manifest, registry binding (registry.js:443-458), requirements (registry.js:2266-2306), service descriptor builders (service.js:3337-3408), validators (validators.js:4774-4919), contract projection (contract:27146-27499), closeout-pack-plan, next-pack-queue, README (#cp00-577), tests, and the RP18 validator script.

Distribution verified exact (failure_recovery:3, implementation:1, hermes_evidence:2, fixture:1, test:2, security_audit:1) against baseline, plan included_units, and CP577_REQUIREMENTS.deliverable_counts. All 10 descriptor rows (S11 lock_conflict_failure through S20 hermes_failure_evidence) carry descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true, raw_payload_included:false.

production_ready is correctly false and runtime_ready false; the pack does not claim production/runtime readiness. production_ready_candidate:true in the Hermes evidence packet is a descriptor-validity flag, not a runtime claim. The no-write attestation and freeze helpers assert all write/runtime/real-data/leak flags safe (no audit-event write, no permission evaluation, no lock acquisition, no real fixture data, no leaks). Security/audit deliverable (S19 Audit failure hint) and blocked-claim/Hermes-evidence rows are descriptor placeholders with customer-safe-errors-only and no raw payload — no detail leak.

Authority boundary is correct: Claude is read-only independent reviewer and not final approver (promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false), human final approval required for runtime opening, enterprise trust not claimed from local validation. Hermes control-plane patterns are used only for deterministic evidence/review-packet descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime, consistent with hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false.

Review-hardening evidence is clean: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1456-byte stdout, well-formed JSON result) — no auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, or missing fields. command-evidence records all implementation, test, contract, plan, and repo-wide validation commands at exit 0. Unrelated dirty/untracked files (UI progress-control-room, workbook docs, LDIP invalid-attempt file) are correctly segregated in changed-file-scope and worktree_transition_policy and are not bundled into this pack. The pending post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are absent as expected at the read_only_claude_run step and are produced downstream in the hardening sequence — not a defect.
